# openai_organization_data_retention (Resource)

Manage organization data retention controls.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "openai_organization_data_retention" "example" {
  type = "zero_data_retention"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `type` (String) type

### Read-Only

- `object` (String) object
- `singleton_id` (String) singleton id

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to = openai_organization_data_retention.example
  id = "organization"
}
```
